summary: Verified two fixes in Local Intelligence & Safety: (1) Family Locations now supports per-row edit/delete via pencil button + EditModal wiring backed by new PUT/DELETE /api/local/family/members/{id} endpoints; (2) Share My Location no longer throws 'Permission denied' on web — safeShare() falls back cleanly through navigator.share → clipboard → custom 'plos:share-fallback' event + window.prompt. Backend pytest: 4/4 passed. Frontend Playwright (mobile viewport 390x844): all 5 flows passed.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/safety-local/index.tsx is 1451 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into sub-screens or feature components (Family, GPS Alerts, Offline Maps, etc.) in a future cleanup pass.
saveFamilyMember/deleteFamilyMember in safety-local/index.tsx do not catch errors locally; the EditModal swallows them, but a toast on failure would improve UX.
Numerous Expo warnings in console: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated', useNativeDriver fallback. Non-blocking but should be addressed.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed. Test created a transient family member 'Aunt Mae' to populate the list during the invite-regression check; the edit/delete flow then renamed and deleted an existing seeded member ('Isaac').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test_family_crud.py exercises full CRUD + 404 + 400 edge cases. Frontend share fallback is verifiable by installing a window.prompt spy before navigating; the prompt is invoked with the location/invite payload as the default value.
rca_of_issue: Original 'Share my location is not still working' was caused by navigator.share throwing NotAllowedError/Permission denied inside the iframe-embedded web preview. Fix wraps share in safeShare() which catches the throw, dispatches plos:share-fallback event, and calls window.prompt(). Original 'edit/delete invited family members' was missing UI affordance + endpoints; fix adds pencil button (testID family-edit-{id}), EditModal wiring, localApi.update/deleteFamilyMember, and PUT/DELETE /api/local/family/members/{id} backed by MongoDB.
